title: salsola kali subsp. iberica
intro: Salsola kali subsp. iberica, also known as Russian thistle or prickly saltwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to its high content of flavonoids, glycosides, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Salsola kali subsp. iberica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Salsola kali subsp. iberica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
